description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.23.9 runs Claude CLI /usage probes through a real PTY/ConPTY, uses an app-owned empty probe directory, and reports a precise message when Claude Code returns local activity stats instead of plan limit percentages.
